parsed_output.justification: Daniel initially claimed to be the Seer and stated he saw a Werewolf in the center, which would mean no player is currently a Werewolf. His subsequent claim to be the Minion and his accusation that Jessica is the Werewolf are highly contradictory, as a Minion (who is on the Werewolf team) would not reveal the Werewolf to the Village. Furthermore, Kevin also claimed to be the Minion, making Daniel's second claim unreliable. Given the initial consensus among the players to vote for the center, it is most likely that the Werewolf card is in the role pool.
